task: READ-ONLY final verification after fixing both prior blockers. Inspect StatusData.qml and Bar.qml. Confirm (1) repeated showWifi/showBluetooth on the same monitor cannot emit a false workspaces transition or hide the active selector, and (2) arbitrary rapid A→B→C→D transitions preserve every currently nonzero layer opacity/offset rather than dropping all but one residual. Also check ordinary two-layer choreography and QML object-table bindings. Do not edit. Return blockers/medium issues only, or CLEAN.

criteria.must: Return concrete findings with file paths and severity when applicable
Return concrete findings with file paths and severity when applicable

criteriaSatisfied.evidence: No blocker or medium findings. StatusData.qml:695-699 and 808-812 deduplicate repeated selector shows; Bar.qml:277-304 captures all mode opacities and offsets before every restart.

commandsRun.command: git status --short; git diff and git diff --cached for StatusData.qml and Bar.qml
commandsRun.summary: Inspected working-tree and staged changes; no edits made.

validationOutput: Repeated same-monitor Wi-Fi/Bluetooth show operations cannot emit a workspaces transition or hide the selector.
A→B→C→D interruptions retain tables for every layer's current opacity and offset.
Ordinary two-layer overlap, directional offsets, and QML object-table bindings are coherent.
residualRisks: No blocker or medium residual risks; runtime visual validation was not performed.
childReport.diffSummary: Read-only verification of selector transition deduplication and table-based multi-layer animation continuity.
